description: Ops/engineering standup chatter: a project codename (PROBED_LATER), a standing infra preference (STANDING_PREF), a rack unit that gets reassigned (SUPERSEDED), and filler chit-chat.

turns.text: Morning. Kicking off the new effort today, we're calling it Project HALCYON internally, keep it off the public boards.
Morning! Understood, Project HALCYON stays internal. Ready to help when you need me.
Quick standing thing: whenever you draft a deploy checklist for me, always put the rollback step first, not last. I've been burned by that ordering before.
Got it, rollback step goes first on every deploy checklist from here on.
Build server moved, it's in rack unit BX-44 now, same credentials as before.
Logged, build server now in rack unit BX-44, credentials unchanged.
Coffee machine on three is broken again, second time this month.
That machine has a rough life. A facilities ticket might actually stick this time.
Correction on the build server: they re-racked it again overnight, it's actually BX-51 now, not BX-44. BX-44 is decommissioned.
Updated, build server is BX-51 now. BX-44 marked decommissioned.
Parking garage is repainting levels two and three all week.
So everyone fights for level one, allow ten extra minutes.
My gym added one of those climbing walls. Tempted to try it.
Do it, worst case is a story, best case is a hobby.
Reading anything good? I need a book for the flight.
If you want absorbing but light, a heist novel beats a doorstopper at thirty thousand feet.
The vending machine took my dollar and gave me nothing. Tiny tragedies.
Technically a loan with no terms. Shake gently, file a complaint.
Remind me, what's our project codename?
Project HALCYON.
Which rack unit is the build server in right now?
Draft me a deploy checklist for tomorrow's release.

probes.question: Remind me, what's our project codename?
Which rack unit is the build server in right now?
Draft me a deploy checklist for tomorrow's release.
